basic_details.job_title: Swami Atmanand Excellent English Medium Schools – Teacher, Computer Teacher and More – 57 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Education Officer & Secretary, Swami Atmanand Utkrisht Vidyalaya Prabandhan Samiti, Balodabazar-Bhatapara (C.G.)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only - via Google Form link
basic_details.short_information: Swami Atmanand Excellent English Medium Schools Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 57 vacancies for Teaching posts. Candidates can apply online only from 26.05.2026 to 15.06.2026 through SEJES's website balodabazar.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Entire education from Class 6 to post-graduation must be through English medium (mandatory), EXCEPT for Hindi/Sanskrit Lecturer posts

selection_process: Merit-based on academic marks (no written/oral exam)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only via the Google Form link. No offline/postal applications will be accepted.
seo_tags: SAGES Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 57 Teacher, Computer Teacher and More Posts
